name: NotificationRef
description:
Reference to a notification component generated via the NotificationService.
It can be injected into the content component through the constructor.
For a template, it is declared as part of the implicit context, see examples.

methods.name: close
methods.description: Closes the notification and passes the argument to the afterClosed observable.

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: Value passed back to the observable as a result.

methods.name: dismiss
methods.description: Dismisses the notification and passes the argument to the afterClosed observable as an error.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Value passed back to the observable as an error.
